title: angelica decursiva var. angustiloba
intro: Angelica decursiva var. angustiloba, also known as Chinese angelica or dong quai, is a perennial plant native to China and other parts of Asia. It is a variant of the Angelica decursiva plant and is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Angelica decursiva var. angustiloba include relieving menstrual cramps, improving circulation, and reducing the risk of cardiovascular disease. Herbal preparations of this plant are often consumed in the form of tea, capsules, or tinctures, although it can also be used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various health conditions.
